sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108790" key="u(pomhli/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπομηλίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n108790.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Eastern Thorn, Crataegus orientalis,</tr_> Pallad. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Agric.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
